endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{groupName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{GROUPNAME}} with a real groupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Replace the data for the specified group. Fails if the group does not exist.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{projectName}/events
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1beta1/{projectName}/events
endpoints.description: Deletes all error events of a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{projectName}/events:report
endpoints.description: Report an individual error event and record the event to a log. This endpoint accepts **either** an OAuth token, **or** an [API key](https://support.google.com/cloud/answer/6158862) for authentication. To use an API key, append it to the URL as the value of a `key` parameter. For example: `POST https://clouderrorreporting.googleapis.com/v1beta1/{projectName}/events:report?key=123ABC456` **Note:** [Error Reporting] (https://cloud.google.com/error-reporting) is a global service built on Cloud Logging and doesn't analyze logs stored in regional log buckets or logs routed to other Google Cloud projects.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{projectName}/groupStats
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTNAME}} with a real projectname.
